allow: Bash(cd /home/jopi/HoneypotTracker/backend && ls .venv/bin/python* 2>/dev/null; which python3; pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i maxmind; pip3 list 2>/dev/null | grep -i maxmind)

Bash(./venv/bin/python3 -c "
import maxminddb
reader = maxminddb.open_database\('data/GeoLite2-City.mmdb'\)
meta = reader.metadata\(\)
print\(f'DB type: {meta.database_type}'\)
import datetime
print\(f'Build date: {datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(meta.build_epoch\)}'\)

for ip in ['8.8.8.8', '1.1.1.1', '185.220.101.1']:
    record = reader.get\(ip\)
    if record:
        country = record.get\('country', {}\).get\('names', {}\).get\('en', '?'\)
        city = record.get\('city', {}\).get\('names', {}\).get\('en', '?'\)
        loc = record.get\('location', {}\)
        lat = loc.get\('latitude', 0\)
        lon = loc.get\('longitude', 0\)
        print\(f'{ip}: country={country}, city={city}, lat={lat}, lon={lon}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'{ip}: no record'\)
reader.close\(\)
")
Bash(systemctl --user list-units --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -i honeypot; sudo systemctl list-units --type=service 2>/dev/null | grep -i honeypot)
